description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a simple, utilitarian design. The front facade features a large, central double-door entrance flanked by two blue-painted sections and brown vertical accents, possibly simulating wood or metal paneling. To the right of the entrance, there is a small, gridded window and what appears to be a stack of materials or products, suggesting a functional, business-oriented exterior. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with minimal detailing except for two small, square windows on one side. The roof is flat and unadorned, typical of many urban commercial structures. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a focus on practicality and accessibility.
description: A modern, rectangular hardware store with a flat roof, blue and brown accents, and a central double-door entrance. The facade is functional and businesslike, with minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double doors, blue and brown vertical accents, a small window, and stacked items near the right side.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals two small, square windows and the plain, unadorned wall surface.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely plain wall with no windows, doors, or decorative features.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain wall with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a central double-door entrance, a small window to the right, and stacked items near the entrance. The facade is accented with blue and brown vertical panels, while the rest of the building is plain.
